description: Letter from Sulaymān al-Kohen, unknown location, to his mother and brothers Faraj Allāh, Yaʿaqov, and Yiṣḥaq, in Cairo. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Late, probably no earlier than 14th century. Consists mainly of greetings. Many people are named.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לקהיר. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
